full_text:
Plan for sample S104 culturing,

Cell count:

total: 9.36 e6

live: 5.15 e6

viability: 55%

size: 7.5 um

Total cell count: 8.245 e6 / ml

Volume: 10 mL = 82.45 e6

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops):

RNA/DNA + FFPE: 34 wells x 50 µl = 1700 µl

2000 cells/µl = 3.40E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 850 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 206 uL

medium → 501.8 uL

ome-gel → 120 µl

aprotinin → 2.6 µl

thrombin → 2.6 µl

fibrinogen → 17 µl

B) Drug treatment:

7 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 42 wells

42 wells x 50 µl = 2100 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 4.20E6 cells

→ make 3 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 700 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 170 uL

medium → 412.8 uL

ome-gel → 99 µl

aprotinin → 2.1 µl

thrombin → 2.1 µl

fibrinogen → 14 µl

Sample ID: S104_pAdnL

total: 7.13 e6

live: 4.74 e6

viability: 66.5 %

size: 7.6 um

C) IF on drug treatment:

7 conditions x 6 wells/condition= 42 wells

42 wells x 8 µl = 336 µl → make 400 µl

2000 cells/µl = 0.80E6 cells

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 97 uL

medium → 236.2 uL

ome-gel → 56.4 µl

aprotinin → 1.2 µl

thrombin → 1.2 µl

fibrinogen → 8 µl

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

volume to take from cell suspension: 364 uL

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

Altogether:

Medium needed 34 x 350 uL = 11.9 mL

42 x 300 uL= 12.6 mL

42 x 150 uL = 6.3 ~ 40 mL

Omegel needed = 593.4 uL

aprotinin = 12.7 uL

thrombin = 12.7 uL

fibrinogen = 84 uL

Drug treatment conditions:

Plate 1

control

olaparib 20

pembro 10

ATXi 0.5 uM

ATXi 1 uM

ola + pembro

ola + ATXi 0.5 uM

Treatment plan:

For the 48-well plate 50 uL of concentrated drug:

(300 + 50) uL / 50 uL = 7x conc.

For the 96-well plate 25 uL of conc. drug:

(150 + 25) uL / 25 uL = 7x conc.

-> 6 x 50 uL + 6 x 25 uL = 450 uL

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Compound | [Stock] | Location of the stock | [working] | [end]
(350uL / 50uL = 7) | c1v1 = c2v2;
c1*450 uL =c2*X
DMSO (control) | 100 % | RT, lab | 0.1 % | 0.7 % | 3.15 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 20 uM | 140 uM | 6.3 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 40 uM | 280 uM | 12.6 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 10 ug / mL | 70 ug / mL | 6.3 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 50 ug / mL | 350 ug / mL | 31.5 uL
OlaPembro | see above | see above | 20 uM + 
10 ug / mL | 140 uM
70 ug / mL | 6.3 uL +
6.3 uL +
OlaPembro | see above | see above | 40 uM + 
50 ug / mL | 280 uM
350 ug / mL | 12.6 uL +
31.5 uL
